---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for RC Engine
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What limitation are you running into?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Domain

Which part of the pipeline does this affect?

- [ ] Pre-RC (Research)
- [ ] RC (Build)
- [ ] Post-RC (Validation)
- [ ] Traceability (Audit)
- [ ] Pipeline infrastructure
- [ ] Web UI
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, or references that help illustrate the request.
